HGSS.697.0001:
Our battle was remarkable!\f
I wish for something to remember
you by!\f
Perhaps your phone number will do?\f
My training makes it impossible to
chat much, but... [0200,0000]
HGSS.697.0002:
I must train harder to become
the mightiest!
HGSS.697.0003:
If you decide you want my number, come
and find me.
HGSS.697.0004:
My training makes chatting tough.
So, take down my number? [0200,0000]
HGSS.697.0005:
Today, I’d like to thank you,
[0103,0000,0000]!\f
I’ve been training all alone...
I was happy that you cared to call...\f
[0103,0000,0000]! I want you to have this!\f
HGSS.697.0006:
Your strength will not let you carry
another thing! I will hold this till you\r
lighten your Bag!
HGSS.697.0007:
Excuse me?
If you’re nearby, then I’d appreciate\r
the politeness of talking face-to-face!
HGSS.697.0008:
Are you still on your journey?
I remain dedicated to my training.\r
Oooooaaarrrgh!
HGSS.697.0009:
My apologies, but I don’t have time to
chat while I am in training!\f
I’ll have time to chat tomorrow!
Yiiihah!
HGSS.697.0010:
I plan to take a lunch break, so come
and visit with me then!\r
Ayiiiyah!
HGSS.697.0011:
I’m taking a break on Route 45!
Why not drop by? We can have a battle!
HGSS.697.0012:
I rested up over my lunch break.
Now, it’s time to resume training!\r
Oooryaah!
